title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
